name: Suburban Exchange Inc
description_short: Family-owned buy/sell/trade business in Walled Lake, MI specializing in precious metals, jewelry, tools, and musical equipment with cash payouts and repair services.
description_long:
Suburban Exchange is a local family-owned business established in 2005 that has grown from 1,400 to 3,000 square feet in downtown Walled Lake, Michigan. The company positions itself as an alternative to traditional pawn shops, emphasizing honest dealing and respect for customers.

The business operates as a multi-category buy/sell/trade marketplace. Core services include purchasing gold, silver, diamonds, and jewelry (including scrap, broken, and dental gold) with instant cash payouts. They also buy, sell, and trade power tools, garden equipment, musical instruments (guitars, amplifiers), electronics, and other gently used goods. Additional services include watch and jewelry repairs (batteries, bands, sizing, repairs) and a buyback program for precious metals.

Suburban Exchange differentiates itself through operational transparency—they test and weigh gold in the customer's presence and claim to pay the highest possible prices. The business emphasizes a clean, organized, safe environment with confidential transactions. They offer layaway options on purchases and accept trade-ins across multiple product categories. The inventory shown includes specialty items like vintage Gibson guitars and power equipment.

As a collateral-based buyer rather than a loan originator, Suburban Exchange functions primarily as a resale marketplace with precious metals expertise. Customers should understand this is a buy/sell/trade operation, not a lending service—transactions are one-way cash exchanges for items, not loans against collateral. The company's success depends on accurate pricing, item condition assessment, and fair market evaluation.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Tests and weighs gold in customer's presence for transparency
Instant cash payouts—no checks or payment delays
3,000 sq ft showroom with 60+ feet of jewelry display cases
Diverse inventory beyond jewelry (tools, musical equipment, electronics, garden equipment)
Established local business since 2005 with documented growth
On-site watch and jewelry repair services (batteries, sizing, bands, full repairs)
cons: Pricing is determined by the business with no independent verification mechanism noted
Limited geographic reach—single location in Walled Lake, MI only
No online transaction capability mentioned; customers must visit physical location
No clear buyback pricing formula or rate structure disclosed on website
Subject to commodity market fluctuations for gold/silver valuations
best_for: People with unwanted, broken, or scrap gold/silver seeking quick cash
Musicians and tool enthusiasts buying or selling used equipment locally
Customers preferring face-to-face transactions with transparent weight/testing
Those seeking layaway financing on collectible or specialty items
diagnosis: Suburban Exchange is best for local Walled Lake-area residents and collectors who need immediate cash for precious metals or want to buy/sell specialty items (tools, guitars, electronics) in person with transparent evaluation. The main caveat is that this is a one-way cash transaction business—not a lending service—and customers have no recourse if they later believe their items were undervalued.
services: Gold and silver purchasing (scrap, broken, coins, dental, watches)
Buy/sell/trade of musical instruments and amplifiers
Watch battery replacement and band installation
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 1110 N Pontiac Trail, Walled Lake, MI 48390
